name: I Say"cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray an 8-inch springform pan with non-stick spray and set aside.
3. In a small bowl, mix together graham crumbs and sugar. Add egg white.
4. Stir until well blended. Press crumb mixture firmly over the bottom and part way up the sides of the springform pan.
5. Bake just until edges feel firm and dry, about 8 minutes. Be careful not to overbake. Set aside to cool.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 300°F.
7. In a blender, process cottage cheese and sour cream until smooth (about 1 minute).
8. Add sugar, flour, egg, egg whites, and vanilla; blend again until well combined.
9. Pour the filling into the pie crust and bake about 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until edges are dry to touch and center jiggles only slightly when pan is shaken.
10. Remove from oven and let cool completely. Cover and refrigerate for at least 5 hours before serving.
11. Run a knife along the inside edge of the pan and remove sides.
12. Serve with pie filling or fresh fruit on top.
Makes 8 large slices.
